#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj*\

## `downloadR`: Echoverse module: Single- and multi-threaded downloading functions.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `downloadR`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/downloadR")
library(downloadR)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/articles/downloadR)

# Package index

## General downloaders

Core functions for downloading files via multiple methods

- [`downloader()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/downloader.md)
  : downloader wrapper

- [`download_vcf()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/download_vcf.md)
  : Download a remote VCF file and its index file

- [`load_rdata()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/load_rdata.md)
  :

  `load_rdata`

## AWS

Download files from Amazon Web Services S3 buckets

- [`aws()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/aws.md) :
  AWS downloader

## Figshare

List and download files from Figshare repositories

- [`figshare_list()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/figshare_list.md)
  : List Figshare files
- [`figshare_download()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/figshare_download.md)
  : Download Figshare files

## Zenodo

List and upload files to Zenodo repositories

- [`zenodo_list()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/zenodo_list.md)
  : List Zenodo files
- [`zenodo_upload()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/downloadR/reference/zenodo_upload.md)
  : Zenodo upload
